Sealed snapshot main: 4387f50 (Task 0106 verifier-PASS bookkeeping). Adds `sourceplane webhook sign` CLI subcommand — symmetric counterpart to Task 0106's `webhook verify`, wraps already-exported `signWebhookPayload` from @saas/webhook-verifier. Pure local crypto — no network/auth/SDK/`Sourceplane`/`fetch(`/`/v1/`. Surface: --secret/--timestamp REQUIRED; --body=PATH or STDIN (mutex); --output=human|json (default human). Output human: `signature: sha256=<hex>\ntimestamp: <ts>`; json: `{"signature":"sha256=...","timestamp":"..."}`. Exit 0 on success, exit 2 UsageError. PR boundary (≤5 paths): packages/cli/src/commands/webhook-sign.ts NEW, packages/cli/src/cli-runner.ts (register + help line), packages/cli/src/__tests__/webhook-sign.test.ts NEW with ≥12 cases including round-trip integration with helper's verifyWebhookSignature, pnpm-lock.yaml (likely no delta — @saas/webhook-verifier dep already on packages/cli from 0106), ai/reports/task-0107-implementer.md (committed on PR branch — do NOT repeat 0106 missing-report gap). Hard rules: zero edits anywhere outside packages/cli/**; do NOT modify packages/webhook-verifier/** (locked from 0105); no node:crypto/node:buffer/Node-only crypto (sign through helper only); body bytes verbatim (no .trim/JSON.parse/decode-then-re-encode); no new eslint-disable/@ts-ignore/@ts-expect-error/as any; the single `as unknown as StdinLike` boundary cast pattern from webhook-verify.ts:179 is acceptable. Task 0106 SCOPED 2026-05-31 (orchestrator). Implementer prompt at ai/tasks/task-0106.md. Branch impl/task-0106-cli-webhook-verify. Sealed snapshot main: b619e9d (Task 0105 verifier-PASS bookkeeping). Adds new CLI subcommand `sourceplane webhook verify` that wires the just-merged @saas/webhook-verifier (Task 0105, PR #160 squash a1436fc) into the user-facing CLI. Pure local-crypto verification — no network, no auth, no org context, no SDK call. Surface: --secret, --signature, --timestamp REQUIRED; --body=PATH or STDIN (mutex); --tolerance-seconds=N (default 300); --output=human|json. Exit 0 on valid sig, exit 4 on verifier failure (passes through helper reason codes verbatim), exit 2 on argument errors via UsageError. PR boundary (5 paths max): packages/cli/package.json (add @saas/webhook-verifier workspace dep), packages/cli/src/commands/webhook-verify.ts NEW, packages/cli/src/cli-runner.ts (register + help block), packages/cli/src/__tests__/webhook-verify.test.ts NEW with ≥12 cases, pnpm-lock.yaml. Hard rules: zero edits anywhere outside packages/cli/**; do NOT modify packages/webhook-verifier/** (just merged); no Sourceplane/fetch/`/v1/`; no node:* imports; binary-safe body reading (no JSON-parse, no .trim, no decode-then-re-encode); no new eslint-disable/@ts-ignore/@ts-expect-error/as unknown as/as any. Acceptance: pnpm -r typecheck=0 (39 workspaces), pnpm -r --no-bail lint ≤45 warnings all in tests/api-edge, build/test green with ≥12 new passing cases, e2e smoke (sign-and-verify roundtrip via stdin) green in both human and json modes, kiox orun validate/plan/run dry-run green selecting only CLI lanes, PR-CI 4/4 green via gh run view --log. Dogfoods Task 0105 inside the monorepo (catches packaging/ESM-resolution issues the helper's own test suite cannot). Parallel-safe with anything in flight (zero apps/contracts/sdk/console overlap). Real PR number required (TBD = blocked).

Task 0105 SCOPED 2026-05-31 (orchestrator). Implementer prompt at ai/tasks/task-0105.md. Branch impl/task-0105-webhook-verifier. PIVOT FROM ORIGINAL FRAMING: the previously sketched 'CLI auth/SDK consumer swap' (packages/cli/src/auth/**) is ALREADY ON MAIN — login.ts/whoami.ts/logout.ts already construct Sourceplane and have zero fetch(/v1//header-building. Swapping validation from client.organizations.list() to client.auth.getSession() would regress: CLI accepts API-key bearers (actorType=service_principal) but /v1/auth/session only resolves session-token bearers (actorType=user) per apps/identity-worker/src/services/auth.ts. That swap is a backend design question, not a single-PR consumer swap — defer. Per orchestrator's 'trust code reality over stale docs' rule, pivoted Task 0105 to next-highest-leverage human-independent candidate: B5 roadmap leg (specs/roadmap.md:81-82) — ship the @saas/webhook-verifier helper package. Pure external-consumer helper, zero coupling to internal workers, mirrors @saas/notifications-client zero-deps shape, signing scheme already locked in apps/webhooks-worker/src/delivery.ts:45 (HMAC-SHA256 over `${timestamp}.${body}`, header X-Webhook-Signature, prefix sha256=). New package packages/webhook-verifier/ (package.json with empty runtime deps, tsconfig, tsconfig.build, component.yaml mirroring packages/notifications-client/component.yaml structure, README ≤1.5KB, src/index.ts exporting verifyWebhookSignature + signWebhookPayload + header constants + DEFAULT_TOLERANCE_SECONDS=300, vitest suite ≥18 tests). Hard rules: WebCrypto only (zero node:* anywhere under packages/webhook-verifier/**); zero runtime dependencies (devDependencies only); constant-time signature comparison (no early return mid-byte-loop); case-insensitive header lookup for both Record and Headers inputs; component.yaml MANDATORY (workspace-package-component-yaml-audit pitfall); zero edits to apps/webhooks-worker/**, packages/sdk/**, packages/cli/**, packages/contracts/**, apps/web-console-next/**, tooling/**, tests/api-edge/**, kiox.lock. Acceptance: pnpm -r typecheck=0 (workspace count +1 vs main), pnpm -r --no-bail lint ≤45 warnings all in tests/api-edge, build/test green, kiox orun validate/plan/run dry-run select exactly 3 webhook-verifier Verify lanes, PR-CI 4/4 green via gh run view --log.
